caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is centered against a solid dark background. She wears a light green tunic adorned with small floral embroidery around the neckline and a dark necklace. In each frame, she is speaking, gesturing with both hands raised in front of her chest to emphasize her points. Her facial expressions shift from a neutral speaking pose to a slight smile. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her tunic. In the lower-left corner of the scene, a small circular logo appears next to the text "NPTEL". As the sequence progresses, the woman continues her explanation, with her hand positions shifting slightly to accompany her speech, while the background and her attire remain constant.
